name: Hostile Takeover
description: Steal one unsolved bug from another team. Can be used at the start of or during the solving phase.

name: System Freeze
description: Target team cannot submit answers for 3 minutes.

name: Firewall
description: Gives your team protection for 10 minutes from Freeze or Steal attacks.

name: Cleanse
description: Cancels the effect of a Freeze or Steal. The attack becomes null and void.
